title: xeranthemum neumayeri
intro: Xeranthemum neumayeri, also known as Neumayer's dandelion or mountain dandelion, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of gastrointestinal issues such as constipation and indigestion. The health benefits of Xeranthemum neumayeri include its potential to help lower blood pressure and improve overall digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the roots and leaves in a tincture or decoction.
